.. 0 JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, AARON MOSES IS TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 54 BRIGHTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE PLACE UNTIL 1-31-95. SIXTEEN HUNDRED IN PRINCIPAL SHALL BE AWARDED PLAINTIFF, AARON MOSES. A PERSONAL INJURY CLAIM SHALL BE RETAINED BY DEFENDANT, SHARON BRAUN. PLAINTIFF, AARON MOSES WILL GIVE DEFENDANT, SHARON BRAUN, 24 HOURS NOTICE BEFORE ENTERING THE PREMISES AT 54 BRIGHTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. ANY ITEMS ON THE PREMISES BELONGING TO THE PLAINTIFF, WILL BE LEFT ON THE PREMISES WHEN THE DEFENDANT MOVES.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNN, SHARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 54 BRIGHTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,600.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS.
